Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: petrpan26
Message:
docs(03-python-sdk): create phase plan for Python SDK

4 plans across 3 waves covering all SDK-* requirements:
- Plan 01 (W1): project skeleton, types, protocol encoding
- Plan 02 (W1): operators, @stream/@view decorators, metaclass
- Plan 03 (W2): TCP client, App class with all commands
- Plan 04 (W3): end-to-end integration tests against live server
